meta.title: Solar Fleet Monitoring Software India | NECTYR & ORION
meta.description: Solar plant monitoring software for cleaning fleets: NECTYR operations portal and ORION plant intelligence. SCADA complement, API integrations, predictive cleaning scheduling.
meta.openGraphDescription: Solar plant performance monitoring and fleet analytics — scheduling, coverage audits, AMC tickets, and AI-driven plant intelligence for Indian utility solar.

schema.name: Taypro NECTYR Solar Fleet Monitoring Software
schema.description: Fleet monitoring and plant operations software for solar cleaning robots in India — scheduling, telemetry, coverage audits, and ORION plant intelligence roadmap.

hero.title: Solar fleet monitoring software — beyond basic SCADA
hero.subtitle: Procurement teams search for solar plant monitoring software — not product codenames. NECTYR is Taypro's live fleet operations portal. ORION is the plant intelligence layer that ties cleaning, weather, and yield into one decision loop.

cards.heading: What solar fleet monitoring software should deliver
cards.subheading: Basic SCADA shows kWh after the loss. Fleet software should explain why — and trigger action.

card0.title: Cleaning schedule & coverage
card0.body: Plan cycles, assign blocks, track route completion, and audit which panels were cleaned each night — block-level evidence for O&M and lenders.

card1.title: Fleet health & AMC tickets
card1.body: Robot telemetry, battery status, fault alerts, and structured ticket workflow for regional service teams.

card2.title: Performance correlation
card2.body: Tie cleaning events to PR recovery trends. ORION roadmap adds dust-storm prediction and yield forecasting on top of NECTYR data.

card3.title: Enterprise integrations
card3.body: API exports and integrations for asset managers running multi-site portfolios — complementing existing SCADA, not replacing it.

card4.title: Mobile & web access
card4.body: O&M managers schedule cycles, approve tickets, and review coverage from web or mobile — not just control-room SCADA terminals.

card5.title: AMC workflow automation
card5.body: Fault alerts create structured tickets routed to regional service teams with remote diagnostics before truck rolls.

pillar0.title: NECTYR fleet portal
pillar0.body: Web and mobile app for scheduling, monitoring, reporting, and AMC on deployed Taypro cleaning robots since 2022.

pillar1.title: ORION plant intelligence
pillar1.body: AI-driven plant health monitoring — predictive cleaning schedules, dust event alerts, and yield analytics for Taypro fleets.

pillar2.title: AI & data advantage
pillar2.body: 11 billion+ annual panel cleaning passes generate labelled operational data — the foundation for predictive O&M beyond generic SCADA.

prose.heading: How Taypro monitoring differs from SCADA and generic solar software
prose.p1: SCADA monitors inverters and meters — it tells you generation dropped. It does not schedule cleaning, prove which blocks were cleaned, or predict dust events before PR drifts. NECTYR closes the execution gap for cleaning fleets.
prose.p2: ORION extends fleet logs into plant intelligence — predictive cleaning, dust alerts, and yield correlation. See the plant data intelligence page for procurement framing and roadmap detail.
prose.p3: NECTYR ships with every Taypro robot deployment. Request a demo to review scheduling, coverage reports, and integration options for your SCADA stack.

faq.heading: Solar monitoring software — FAQ
faq.subheading: Questions from asset managers evaluating fleet and plant monitoring platforms.
faq.a0: NECTYR is Taypro's fleet operations software for solar cleaning robots — scheduling, block-level coverage logs, AMC ticketing, and monthly settlement reports. It is included with Taypro robot deployments and OPEX programmes.
faq.a1: No. NECTYR complements SCADA by managing cleaning fleet execution and evidence. SCADA remains essential for inverter and electrical monitoring. Together they close the soiling-to-action loop.
faq.a2: ORION is Taypro's roadmap platform for AI-driven plant health — predictive cleaning scheduling, dust-storm alerts, and yield forecasting built on data from deployed Taypro fleets.
faq.q3: Can I use NECTYR without Taypro robots?
faq.a3: NECTYR is designed for Taypro cleaning robot fleets. Contact Taypro for enterprise discussions if you operate a mixed-vendor portfolio.
faq.q4: Does the platform support API integrations?
faq.a4: Enterprise deployments can integrate NECTYR data exports with asset management systems. Discuss API requirements during commercial onboarding.
faq.q5: What data does fleet monitoring capture?
faq.a5: Cycle completion, route coverage, block-level panels cleaned, robot health, battery status, fault events, and operator actions — exportable for O&M audits and PR analysis.
faq.q6: How does monitoring improve solar plant performance?
faq.a6: By tying cleaning cadence to soiling and PR recovery with auditable evidence — enabling more cycles where needed and avoiding wasted passes where not. ORION adds predictive scheduling on top.
faq.q7: How do I request a demo?
faq.a7: Share your plant capacity, current monitoring stack, and whether you have or plan Taypro robots. Taypro will arrange a NECTYR walkthrough and ORION roadmap briefing.
faq.q8: Is NECTYR included with robot purchase or OPEX?
faq.a8: Yes. NECTYR fleet monitoring is part of Taypro robot deployments and managed OPEX programmes — not a separate software licence for standard utility deployments.
faq.q9: What is the difference between NECTYR and ORION?
faq.a9: NECTYR is live fleet operations — scheduling, coverage, tickets, billing. ORION is the intelligence layer — predictive scheduling, dust alerts, yield analytics — on roadmap for Taypro fleet customers.
faq.q10: Can NECTYR data export to Excel or BI tools?
faq.a10: Coverage and cycle reports export for monthly governance. Enterprise API integrations discussed during onboarding.
faq.q11: Does fleet monitoring work on tracker and fixed-tilt mixed plants?
faq.a11: Yes. NECTYR maps heterogeneous fleets — GLYDE, GLYDE-X, NYUMA, NYUMA-X, HELYX — within one plant or portfolio view.

steps.heading: How solar fleet monitoring software deploys on your plant
steps.step0Body: NECTYR activates when Taypro robots mobilise — robots mapped to blocks, rows, and zones in the plant model.
steps.step1Body: Cleaning cycles, paths, rest zones, and idle rules configured per plant security and O&M requirements.
steps.step2Body: LTE, Wi-Fi, mesh, or LoRaWAN as designed. Fleet health, battery, and route data stream to NECTYR dashboard.
steps.step3Body: Monthly panel-volume reports for OPEX billing. Exportable logs for asset managers and auditors.
steps.step4Body: Attach plant intelligence layer at renewal — predictive cleaning and dust-event correlation on existing fleet data.

eligibility.title: Who needs solar plant monitoring software beyond SCADA?
eligibility.for0: Asset managers with Taypro cleaning robots needing coverage evidence and AMC workflow
eligibility.for1: O&M teams correlating cleaning cadence with PR recovery across blocks
eligibility.for2: Multi-site portfolios requiring consistent reporting format across states
eligibility.for3: Procurement teams evaluating SCADA complement for cleaning execution
eligibility.not0: Standalone SCADA replacement for inverter/HV electrical monitoring
eligibility.not1: Non-Taypro robot fleets without enterprise integration discussion
eligibility.not2: Plants with no robotic cleaning programme (no fleet to monitor)

highlight.heading: People search solar plant performance monitoring software.
highlight.lead: They need execution proof — not another generation chart after the MWh is lost.
highlight.body: NECTYR is Taypro's solar fleet monitoring platform: scheduling, coverage, tickets, and settlement. ORION adds predictive plant intelligence on the same data layer.

proseSecondary.heading: Solar plant performance analytics — what NECTYR captures vs SCADA
proseSecondary.p1: SCADA aggregates inverter and meter data at 15-minute intervals. NECTYR logs which robot cleaned which block, route completion percentage, battery state, fault codes, and operator actions — at cleaning-event granularity.
proseSecondary.p2: Asset managers use this to answer: Did we clean before the dust storm? Which blocks were skipped? Is the cleaning vendor billing matches telemetry? SCADA cannot answer these questions.
proseSecondary.p3: ORION roadmap layers weather feeds, soiling models, and yield forecasting — moving from reactive cleaning to predictive O&M for Taypro fleet customers.
